# 📖 Bot Usage Guidelines

Hey there! To make sure everyone has a great time, please stick to these rules and guidelines when chatting with the bot.

---

## 🚫 General Code of Conduct

* **No Command Spamming:** Let’s keep things smooth! Please don’t overwhelm the bot with too many commands or try to slow it down on purpose.
* **No Cheating or Exploiting:** Avoid trying to take advantage of any bugs, glitches, or outside tools for an unfair edge.
* **Follow Discord’s ToS:** Make sure your interactions with the bot align with Discord’s official Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.
* **Report Issues Responsibly:** If you spot any bugs or errors, let the developer know right away or use the `report` command instead of trying to exploit them.
* **Respect Bot Downtime:** If the bot is offline or being updated, please be patient and refrain from flooding support channels with complaints.
* **Have Fun!** The bot is here to make your gaming experience better. Enjoy it, but do so responsibly!

> ⚠️ **Important:** Breaking any of these rules (yes, even the fun one) will lead to a **permanent block** from using the bot.

---

## 🛠️ Rules for Using the `report` Command

The `report` command is designed to keep our community safe and fix any bugs. Misusing this command is a no-go.

### 1️⃣ Stay on Topic
Keep the `report` command for serious matters only—no jokes, spam, or off-topic messages.
* **Penalty:** Misuse could lead to a **temporary ban** from the bot. The length of the ban will be noted in your block reason and will increase with repeated offenses.

### 2️⃣ Provide Evidence When Reporting Users
All reports against other users need to be valid and supported by proof.
* **Penalty:** Submitting false or unfounded reports will earn you a **warning**. After two warnings, a third offense will result in a **temporary block**. If you continue to violate after being unblocked, you’ll face a **permanent ban**.

### 3️⃣ Respect the Bot Developers
We have a strict policy against using the `report` command to insult, troll, or harass our developers or creators. Such behavior is simply unacceptable.
* **Penalty:** You will face an immediate and **permanent ban** from using the bot, and there won’t be any warnings beforehand.
